title: Admissions Open 2026-2027
body: Admissions are now open for Pre KG to Std V for the academic year 2026-2027. Pre KG eligibility: 2.5 years and above. Limited seats available — enquire today!
keywords: admissions open prekg lkg ukg primary 2026 2027 seats available

title: Vidyaarambham Ceremony 2026
body: Join us for the traditional Vidyaarambham learning initiation ceremony on Vijayadashami. Children are formally introduced to the world of alphabets, numbers, and reading. Special enrollment incentives apply for registrations on this day.
keywords: vidyaarambham ceremony learning initiation vijayadashami october dussehra 2026

title: World Yoga Day Performance
body: Our students proudly participated in the World Yoga Day celebrations, showcasing exceptional discipline, focus, and wellness in front of a large gathering.
keywords: yoga day performance achievement world international june

title: State-Level Karate Championship
body: Congratulations to our students who brought home medals from the State-Level Karate Championship and District-Level competitions. A proud moment for the entire school family!
keywords: karate championship state district medals achievement sports

title: World Environment Day Initiative
body: Our students took part in a recyclable art and awareness initiative on World Environment Day, creating beautiful craft projects from recycled materials to promote sustainability.
keywords: environment day recycle craft initiative green activity june

title: New Academic Year Circular
body: Parents are requested to collect the learning kits and uniforms for Pre KG, LKG, UKG, and classes Std I–V. Please visit the school office between 8:30 AM and 4:00 PM.
keywords: circular academic year books kit uniforms collection primary standards

title: District-Level Yoga Championship Win
body: Our school team won medals at the District-Level Yoga Championship, reflecting the dedication of our students and the excellence of our wellness programme.
keywords: yoga championship district medal achievement wellness
